name: azure_blob
description: Write rows to Azure Blob Storage.

config_fields.name: schema
config_fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).

config_fields.name: connection_string
config_fields.description: Azure Storage connection string

config_fields.name: sas_token
config_fields.description: Azure Storage SAS token (with or without leading '?')

config_fields.name: use_managed_identity
config_fields.description: Use Azure Managed Identity for authentication

config_fields.name: account_url
config_fields.description: Azure Storage account URL (e.g., https://mystorageaccount.blob.core.windows.net)

config_fields.name: tenant_id
config_fields.description: Azure AD tenant ID for Service Principal auth

config_fields.name: client_id
config_fields.description: Azure AD client ID for Service Principal auth

config_fields.name: client_secret
config_fields.description: Azure AD client secret for Service Principal auth

config_fields.name: container
config_fields.description: Azure Blob container name

config_fields.name: blob_path
config_fields.description: Path to blob within container (supports Jinja2 templates)

config_fields.name: format
config_fields.description: Data format: csv, json (array), or jsonl (newline-delimited)

config_fields.name: overwrite
config_fields.description: Whether to overwrite existing blob (if False, raises if exists)

config_fields.name: csv_options
config_fields.description: CSV writing options (delimiter, encoding, include_header)

config_fields.name: headers
config_fields.description: Header output mode: 'normalized', 'original', or {field: header} mapping

name: chroma_sink
description: Write pipeline rows into a ChromaDB collection.

config_fields.name: schema
config_fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).

config_fields.name: collection
config_fields.description: ChromaDB collection name

config_fields.name: mode
config_fields.description: Connection mode

config_fields.name: field_mapping
config_fields.description: Maps row fields to ChromaDB document/id/metadata

config_fields.name: on_duplicate
config_fields.description: Behaviour when a document ID already exists

name: csv
description: Write rows to a CSV file.

config_fields.name: schema
config_fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).

config_fields.name: headers
config_fields.description: Header output mode: 'normalized', 'original', or {field: header} mapping

config_fields.name: collision_policy
config_fields.description: Optional local output collision policy. 'fail_if_exists' refuses an existing write target; 'auto_increment' picks a free sibling path; 'append_or_create' is valid with append mode.

name: database
description: Write rows to a database table.

config_fields.name: schema
config_fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).

name: dataverse
description: Write rows to Microsoft Dataverse via OData v4 REST API.

config_fields.name: schema
config_fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).

config_fields.name: environment_url
config_fields.description: Dataverse environment URL (e.g., https://myorg.crm.dynamics.com)

config_fields.name: auth
config_fields.description: Authentication configuration

config_fields.name: api_version
config_fields.description: Dataverse Web API version

config_fields.name: entity
config_fields.description: Target entity logical name

config_fields.name: mode
config_fields.description: Write mode (day-one: upsert only)

config_fields.name: field_mapping
config_fields.description: Pipeline field → Dataverse column mapping

config_fields.name: alternate_key
config_fields.description: Business key field for upsert (PATCH with alternate key)

config_fields.name: lookups
config_fields.description: Lookup field bindings for navigation properties

config_fields.name: additional_domains
config_fields.description: Additional Dataverse domain patterns for SSRF allowlist

name: json
description: Write rows to a JSON file.

config_fields.name: schema
config_fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).

config_fields.name: headers
config_fields.description: Header output mode: 'normalized', 'original', or {field: header} mapping

config_fields.name: collision_policy
config_fields.description: Optional local output collision policy. 'fail_if_exists' refuses an existing write target; 'auto_increment' picks a free sibling path; 'append_or_create' is valid with append mode.
